zh.Kentwell Hall, Long Melford, Suffolk, En: 英國素福爾可朗 梅爾福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Clopton於1423年出生在英國素福爾可朗 梅爾福德時，他的父親William Clopton41歲，母親Lady Margery Francys21歲。他於1449年與Alice Darcy在英國英格蘭艾可馬爾頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1497年4月在他的家鄉享年74歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可朗 梅爾福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Clopton于1423年出生在英国素福爾可朗 梅爾福德时，他的父亲William Clopton41岁，母亲Lady Margery Francys21岁。他于1449年与Alice Darcy在英国英格兰艾可馬爾頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1497年4月在他的家乡享年74岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可朗 梅爾福德。

nameMeanings.name: Clopton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places, for examplein Essex, Suffolk, and Warwickshire, named Clopton from Old Englishclopp(a) ‘rock, hill’ + tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Clopton was born in 1423, in Long Melford, Suffolk, England, his father, William Clopton, was 41 and his mother, Lady Margery Francys, was 21. He married Alice Darcy in 1449, in Maldon, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in April 1497, in his hometown, at the age of 74, and was buried in Long Melford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Clopton est né en 1423, à Long Melford, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, William Clopton, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Lady Margery Francys, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Alice Darcy en 1449, à Maldon, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en avril 1497, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Long Melford, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Clopton 1423 in Long Melford, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Clopton 41 und seine Mutter Lady Margery Francys 21. Er hat 1449 in Maldon, Essex, England, United Kingdom Alice Darcy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb im April 1497 im Alter von 74 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Long Melford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Clopton è nato il nel 1423 nel Long Melford, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, William Clopton, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Lady Margery Francys, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Alice Darcy nel 1449, nel Maldon, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel aprile 1497, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolto a Long Melford, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Kentwell Hall, Long Melford, Suffolk, En: イギリススフォルクロング メルフォード
ja.lifeSummary: John Cloptonが1423年にイギリススフォルクロング メルフォードで生まれた時，父William Cloptonは41歳，母Lady Margery Francysは21歳であった。1449年にイギリスイギリスエセックスマルドンでAlice Darcyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1497年4月に故郷で74歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクロング メルフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Clopton(이)가 1423년 영국 수폴크 론그 멜퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Clopton(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margery Francys(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1449년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 맬던에서 Alice Darcy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1497년 4월 그의 고향에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 론그 멜퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Clopton nasceu em 1423, em Long Melford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Clopton, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margery Francys, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Darcy em 1449, em Maldon, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em abril de 1497, em sua cidade natal, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em Long Melford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Clopton родился в 1423 г. в местности лонг мелфорд, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени William Clopton было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Margery Francys, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Darcy в 1449 г. в местности малдон, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер апрель 1497 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности лонг мелфорд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Clopton nació en 1423, en Long Melford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, William Clopton, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Lady Margery Francys, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Alice Darcy en 1449, en Maldon, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en abril de 1497, en su pueblo, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultado en Long Melford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
